applicationYamls.served_by: config-service to ALL clients as global defaults

notes: Found 12 pom.xml files (root + 11 modules: shared, shared-kafka, services/{config,discovery,api-gateway,auth,user,restaurant,search,order,payment}-service). order-service directory exists but contains only src/ tree; its pom.xml was read in full.
Found 10 application.yml files (config-repo + 9 service-level yml files: discovery, config, api-gateway, auth, user, restaurant, search, order, payment).
services/order-service/ has an application.yml but lives outside services/; it's the tenth service-level file.
Grafana provisioning folder contains datasource.yml (Prometheus @ http://prometheus:9090) and dashboard.yml (provider pointing at /var/lib/grafana/dashboards, folder 'Samato').

docker-compose.yml declares no top-level networks; Docker default bridge is used. Six named volumes: samato-pgdata, samato-kafkadata, samato-redisdata, samato-promdata, samato-grafanadata, samato-osdata.
Payment service is the only consumer of .env (RAZORPAY_KEY_ID/SECRET/WEBHOOK_SECRET via ${VAR:-default} interpolation). .env file is gitignored (per comment in .env.example).

init-databases.sh creates 13 DBs total (fd_shared is set via POSTGRES_DB env, the other 12 are scripted: config, discovery, auth, user_service, restaurant_service, order_service, payment_service, delivery_service, notification_service, search_service, analytics_service, zipkin).

Prometheus scrape job 'spring-boot-services' lists only 3 hosts (config, discovery, api-gateway) using host.docker.internal; all other services (user, restaurant, search, order, payment, auth) are NOT explicitly scraped — the comment says 'service discovery via DNS' but the static_configs block does not list them.
keycloak container is gated by the 'auth' profile (profiles: ["auth"]); it does not start with `docker compose up` without --profile auth.
